MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the balance of this case is dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Off Calendar Apr-24-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-24-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff Mccrutcheon And Production Of Documents; Request For Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Same
Off Calendar Dec-16-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing re:DEFENDANT CROSS MEDIA INTERNATIONAL, INC.'s Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff Mccrutcheon And Production Of Documents; Request For Sanctions.

Appearances by:
Gor Asryan, Esq. of Levin & Nalbandyan, LLP for Plaintiff Albert N McCrutcheon III.
Elliot Soper, Esq. of O'Hagan Meyer for Defendant Cross Media International, Inc.

The matter is argued.

The court hears the argument and takes the matter under submission.

Counsel for the Defendant is to submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Richard B Ulmer Jr; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported.(302/RBU)
